title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wowie! You got so many! Way to go, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If I have this much, I can give one to my mom,
one to Grass, one to El, and still have enough left
for all my other friends!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What else? Oh, right! Let's decorate your office
with them too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Then we'll both remember how much fun we had
today whenever we look at them, hehe! ♪
